name: oat-table-tools
description: Owen's Applied Thinking table promotion commands for VS Code

commands.title: OAT Tables: Promote All Tables in Document

oatTables.workerUrl.description: Cloudflare Worker URL for OAT table promotion.

oatTables.imagesRepoPath.description: Absolute path to the local images repo. Defaults to ~/dev/images.

oatTables.screenshotScriptPath.description: Absolute path to screenshot-html.sh. Defaults to scripts/screenshot-html.sh in this extension if present, then ~/dev/wraith/scripts/screenshot-html.sh.
